page_metadata.biotools__summary: PhEMD is a package for relating a network of single-cell samples. By first modeling the cell-state landscape of a model system and then computing pairwise distances between samples using EMD, PhEMD constructs a low-dimensional embedding that uncovers intrinsic manifold structure.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: PhEMD is a package for relating a network of single-cell samples. By first modeling the cell-state landscape of a model system and then computing pairwise distances between samples using EMD, PhEMD constructs a low-dimensional embedding that uncovers intrinsic manifold structure.
